channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Labour leadership crisis deepens as Keir Starmer faces calls to resign amid internal divisions
item.description: In this editorial, The Independent analyses the ongoing turmoil within the Labour Party as more than 60 MPs urge Prime Minister Keir Starmer to step down. Despite recent election setbacks, Starmer has...

item.title: Victor Osimhen Celebrates Galatasaray Süper Lig Victory as Career Highlight
item.description: Nigerian striker Victor Osimhen don describe im role for Galatasaray Turkish Süper Lig win as one of di most special moments for him career. During di season wey just pass, Osimhen score two goals for...

item.title: Negros Occidental Lawmaker Lets Official Investigations Proceed After Toboso Incident
item.description: Negros Occidental 3rd District Representative Javier Miguel Benitez has decided to withdraw his resolution calling for a congressional investigation into the April 19 Toboso clash, which resulted in 1...

item.title: How Social Media Affected Tanzania’s 2025 Election and National Security
item.description: The 2025 general election in Tanzania highlighted the growing role of social media in shaping political discourse and its implications for national security. During the election period, platforms like...

item.title: Brock Pierce, associate of Jeffrey Epstein, attends Trump statue unveiling as VIP guest
item.description: Brock Pierce, a cryptocurrency entrepreneur and known associate of the late Jeffrey Epstein, attended the unveiling of a large golden statue of former President Donald Trump at Trump National Doral Mi...

item.title: Using Writing to Support Student Well-Being and Learning in English Studies
item.description: Research and classroom experimentation at Nipissing University suggest that writing, particularly when focused on personal reflection and creativity, can enhance students’ mental health rather than he...

item.title: Graduates React Negatively to AI Comparison During Commencement Speech
item.description: During the University of Central Florida's College of Arts and Humanities and Nicholson School of Communication and Media commencement on May 8, 2026, speaker Gloria Caulfield, vice president of strat...

item.title: U.S. Business Leaders to Join Trump on China Visit Amid Aviation and Trade Talks
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is set to visit China this week accompanied by high-profile business executives, including Elon Musk of Tesla, Tim Cook of Apple, Larry Culp of GE Aerospace, and Kelly Ortb...

item.title: Cineplex posts $22.4M loss in Q1 despite revenue growth
item.description: Cineplex Inc., one of Canada's largest movie theatre chains, reported a net loss of $22.4 million in the first quarter of 2026, marking a challenging start to the year. Despite this loss, the company'...

item.title: Ramaphosa to address nation after Constitutional Court allows review of Phala Phala panel report
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa is set to address the nation at 8pm on Monday following a significant ruling by the Constitutional Court regarding the Section 89 proceedings. The court overturned Parliament...

item.title: PM Modi set for six-day visit to UAE, Netherlands, Sweden, Norway, and Italy to strengthen bilateral ties
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is scheduled to undertake a six-day diplomatic tour covering the United Arab Emirates (UAE), Netherlands, Sweden, Norway, and Italy starting this Friday. The trip aims to ...

item.title: Nudge Theory and the Limits of Individual Responsibility in Tackling Systemic Problems
item.description: Nudge theory, developed by behavioural scientists including Richard Thaler and Cass Sunstein, aimed to improve social and environmental outcomes by subtly influencing individual choices rather than im...

item.title: Eliud Kipchoge and French President Macron go for morning run in Nairobi
item.description: On Monday, May 11, 2026, Kenyan marathon legend Eliud Kipchoge accompanied French President Emmanuel Macron for a morning run along University Way in Nairobi. The brief clip that quickly went viral sh...

item.title: Nigerian Stock Market Hits N160 Trillion as Multiple Sectors Gain
item.description: On Monday, May 11, 2026, Nigeria's stock market waka reach a historic milestone as market capitalization cross N160 trillion, showing say investors still dey trust local equities even with wahala for ...

item.title: Dangote Considers Mombasa as Preferred Site for East Africa Oil Refinery Instead of Tanga
item.description: Nigerian billionaire Aliko Dangote has recently shifted his preference for building a 650,000-barrel-per-day oil refinery from Tanzania’s Tanga port to Kenya’s Mombasa port. He cited the deeper port i...

item.title: Heavy Rains Cause Flooding in Kisumu, Forcing Residents to Evacuate
item.description: In Kisumu County, the past night’s heavy rains have caused serious flooding across several sub-counties including Nyando, Kisumu East, Kisumu Central, and Nyakach. Many roads are submerged, making tra...

item.title: Sinner Defeats Popyrin in Straight Sets to Reach Italian Open Round of 16
item.description: Jannik Sinner waka enter the last 16 of the Italian Open after he sharply beat Alexei Popyrin 6-2, 6-0 on Monday. The world number one dey pursue him first title for Rome and he don maintain im impres...

item.title: Electrical Muscle Stimulation as a Supportive Approach for Managing Osteoarthritis
item.description: Osteoarthritis affects an estimated 595 million people globally, making it a leading cause of pain and disability. The condition involves the gradual breakdown of joint tissues, commonly impacting the...

item.title: Investigation Reveals Possible Police Involvement in 750kg Cocaine Bust
item.description: The Madlanga Commission of Inquiry is currently examining the July 2021 case in which 750kg of cocaine, valued at roughly R300 million, was transported from Durban Harbour to Johannesburg. Colonel Fra...

item.title: Tanzania Health Ministry Outlines Key Priorities and Plans for 2026/27 Budget Year
item.description: Dodoma — The Minister for Health, Honourable Mohamed Mchengerwa, has presented the ministry's budget review for 2025/26 and estimates for the coming 2026/27 financial year in Parliament. He confirmed ...
